title: Cuneiform Tablet #0695: Ur III Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
